query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) as total_projetos,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) FROM leads WHERE projectId IS NOT NULL) as projetos_com_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT projectId FROM leads WHERE projectId IS NOT NULL)) as projetos_sem_leads;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) as total_projetos,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) FROM leads WHERE projectId IS NOT NULL) as projetos_com_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT projectId FROM leads WHERE projectId IS NOT NULL)) as projetos_sem_leads;
